message:
feat: Add Nix flake support (closes #27)

Add flake.nix with:
- crane for incremental Rust builds
- fenix for nightly toolchain (required for edition 2024)
- Multi-system support (x86_64/aarch64 linux/darwin)
- Dev shell with rust-analyzer, cargo tools
- Checks for build, clippy, fmt, tests
- Handles toon_rust path dependency via GitHub fetch

Usage:
  nix build        # Build br binary
  nix develop      # Enter dev shell
  nix flake check  # Run all checks

Note: Run 'nix flake lock' to generate flake.lock

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
